Meaning.En: A statement or action intended to provoke laughter or amusement, often through wit, irony, or absurdity.
Meaning.Example: He told a funny joke that made everyone in the room laugh.

Situation.Vi: Nghe một câu đùa vui trong buổi tiệc.
Situation.En: Listening to a funny joke during a party.

Situation.Vi: Thường dùng để làm dịu không khí căng thẳng.
Situation.En: Often used to lighten a tense atmosphere.

Meaning.En: To say or do something humorous or playful, often to amuse others or express lightheartedness.
Meaning.Example: I was only joking—I didn’t really mean to upset you.

Situation.Vi: Nói đùa với bạn bè mà không có ý định nghiêm túc.
Situation.En: Teasing a friend playfully without serious intent.

Situation.Vi: Phản ứng khi ai đó không hiểu mình đang đùa.
Situation.En: Clarifying that you were joking when someone takes your comment literally.
